response.overview: This short follows Jay and Silent Bob (Jason Mewes and Kevin Smith) on a mission to find a mythical infused “Unicorn Donut” made with “Bluntman’s Chronic” at a real donut shop. They believe this special donut could be their big comeback. Along the way, they interact with quirky characters, including a shop owner and other customers, in a laid-back, weed-fueled adventure.
response.title: National Lampoon's Donut Shop
